<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception; /** * @author Oskar Stark <oskarstark@googlemail.com> */ class MissingRequiredOptionException extends IncompleteDsnException { public function __construct(string $option, ?string $dsn = null, ?\Throwable $previous = null) { $message = \sprintf('The option "%s" is required but missing.', $option); parent::__construct($message, $dsn, $previous); } }
